vibe.label: THE VIBE
vibe.title: Midnight Roads &
vibe.desc: Pack your crew, blast your playlist and let the highway disappear behind you. This is the trip you’ve been planning in your head since forever – salty air, bonfire nights, and the freedom of the open road.

itinerary.title: Bangalore → Hubli
itinerary.desc: Depart at 9 PM, drive through the night. Pit-stop chai at Dharwad highway dhabas.

itinerary.title: Hubli → Goa Arrival
itinerary.desc: Roll into North Goa by morning. Check in, crash, recover. Evening: Baga beach sunset.

itinerary.title: North Goa Beach Day
itinerary.desc: Calangute, Anjuna, Vagator – beach hop till you drop. Sunset at Chapora fort.

itinerary.title: South Goa Retreat
itinerary.desc: Palolem and Colva – the quieter, greener side. Private pool villa time.

itinerary.title: Adventure Day
itinerary.desc: Water sports, scuba intro, or just hammock life. Your call.

itinerary.title: Return Drive
itinerary.desc: Early morning checkout, highway drive back to Bangalore. Home by night.

trans.label: HOW WE ROLL
trans.title: Your Ride Details
trans.desc: We don’t do buses. Your own private vehicle, your own pace.

transport.name: Mahindra Thar
transport.detail: 2 slots – off-road capable, open roof optional

transport.name: Fuel Included
transport.detail: Full tank on departure, return to base

pricing.label: INVESTMENT
pricing.headline: Starting from ₹15,000
pricing.pitch: All-inclusive pricing. No hidden costs. Just show up.

squad.title: Small Group, Big Memories
squad.desc: Max 12 people per trip. Minimum strangers, maximum vibes.

cta.sub: Only 3 seats left · ₹2,000 advance to lock in

footer.tagline: Made for the ones who drive till sunrise

vibe.label: THE JOURNEY
vibe.title: Seek Blessings at
vibe.desc: Walk the path that millions of devotees have walked for centuries. The air is thin, the faith is thick and the Himalayas make you feel tiny in the most beautiful way.

itinerary.title: Haridwar → Yamunotri
itinerary.desc: Arrive Haridwar, proceed to Janki Chatti. Trek to Yamunotri shrine.

itinerary.title: Yamunotri → Uttarkashi → Gangotri
itinerary.desc: Drive to Uttarkashi, visit Gangotri temple and Bhagirathi ghats.

itinerary.title: Gangotri → Kedarnath
itinerary.desc: Trek to Gaurikund, helicopter or 16 km trek to Kedarnath. Sacred darshan.

itinerary.title: Kedarnath → Badrinath
itinerary.desc: Drive via Joshimath. Badrinath temple morning aarti. Mana village visit.

itinerary.title: Return via Rishikesh → Haridwar
itinerary.desc: Ganga aarti at Har Ki Pauri. Journey complete, soul renewed.

trans.label: TRAVEL
trans.title: Comfort for Every Km
trans.desc: Tempo Traveller, helicopter options, and porters for the treks.

pricing.label: PACKAGE COST
pricing.headline: 12-Day Complete Package
pricing.pitch: Accommodation, meals, transport, and guide all included.

squad.title: Journey Together, Pray Together
squad.desc: Groups of 8–20. Family-friendly. All ages welcome.

footer.tagline: Where the mountains meet the divine

vibe.label: ROMANCE
vibe.title: Love Story Written in
vibe.desc: Float on a Dal Lake houseboat as the sun sets behind the Himalayas. Ride the Gulmarg gondola hand-in-hand to a world dusted in white. Kashmir is not a destination – it’s a feeling.

itinerary.title: Arrive Srinagar
itinerary.desc: Welcome with kahwa. Check into deluxe houseboat on Dal Lake.

itinerary.title: Dal Lake & Old City
itinerary.desc: Morning shikara ride. Mughal gardens: Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh. Spice market.

itinerary.title: Gulmarg
itinerary.desc: Gondola ride to Apharwat Peak – snow experience. Meadow walk. Horse ride.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam
itinerary.desc: Drive to Betaab Valley, Aru Valley. Lidder river picnic.

itinerary.title: Sonmarg Day Trip
itinerary.desc: Glacier views at Thajiwas. Hot chocolate with mountain backdrop.

itinerary.title: Leisure & Shopping
itinerary.desc: Kashmiri shawls, saffron, walnut crafts. Candlelit dinner on the lake.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Farewell with wazwan breakfast and transfer to airport.

trans.label: HOW YOU TRAVEL
trans.title: Private & Comfortable
trans.desc: Dedicated private car for the couple throughout the trip.

transport.name: Private Innova Crysta
transport.detail: Dedicated for the couple, all transfers

pricing.label: HONEYMOON PACKAGE
pricing.headline: 7 Nights Complete Package
pricing.pitch: Romantic setup, candle dinners, and couple activities included.

squad.title: Just the Two of You
squad.desc: Private experience – no group tours, no strangers.

footer.tagline: Where every view is a postcard

vibe.label: THE WILDERNESS
vibe.title: A Meadow Painted by
vibe.desc: 500+ species of wildflowers bloom across a 7.5 km valley at 11,500 ft. Every monsoon, this hidden UNESCO gem transforms into a rolling canvas of colour. The trek is moderate – the views are extraordinary.

itinerary.title: Haridwar → Joshimath
itinerary.desc: Drive or overnight bus to Joshimath. Rest and acclimatization.

itinerary.title: Joshimath → Govindghat → Ghangaria
itinerary.desc: 13 km trek (or mule ride) to base camp Ghangaria at 10,200 ft.

itinerary.title: Valley of Flowers
itinerary.desc: 8 km trek into the valley. Full day exploring the bloom.

itinerary.title: Hemkund Sahib (Optional)
itinerary.desc: Sacred Sikh shrine at 14,100 ft. Tough but rewarding.

itinerary.title: Return to Govindghat
itinerary.desc: Trek back to Ghangaria, then Govindghat.

itinerary.title: Govindghat → Haridwar
itinerary.desc: Drive back, overnight arrival.

trans.label: THE ROUTE
trans.title: Getting There
trans.desc: Mix of road and trek. Mule options at key points.

transport.name: Mule / Pony
transport.detail: Available at extra cost if needed

pricing.label: TREK PACKAGE
pricing.headline: All-Inclusive 6-Day Trek
pricing.pitch: Expert guide, meals on trail, camping gear all included.

squad.title: Small Batches, Big Experiences
squad.desc: Max 10 trekkers per batch. Expert-to-trekker ratio 1:5.

footer.tagline: Where flowers bloom higher than clouds

vibe.label: THE EXPERIENCE
vibe.title: Live Like
vibe.desc: Drift through dunes on camelback, sleep in palace hotels, and watch the sun set over Pichola Lake. Rajasthan doesn’t just show you history – it makes you part of it.

itinerary.title: Jaipur – Pink City
itinerary.desc: Amber Fort, City Palace, Hawa Mahal, bazaar shopping.

itinerary.title: Jaipur → Jodhpur
itinerary.desc: Road drive. Mehrangarh Fort, Jaswant Thada, blue city views.

itinerary.title: Jodhpur → Jaisalmer
itinerary.desc: Desert city. Jaisalmer Fort, havelis, Patwon Ki Haveli.

itinerary.title: Sam Sand Dunes
itinerary.desc: Camel safari, cultural evening, folk dance, stargazing in the Thar.

itinerary.title: Jaisalmer → Udaipur
itinerary.desc: Long drive via Pali. Check in by lake.

itinerary.title: Udaipur
itinerary.desc: City Palace, Lake Pichola boat ride, Jagdish Temple, sunset cruise.

itinerary.title: Departure
itinerary.desc: Transfer to Udaipur airport or train station.

trans.label: TRAVEL
trans.title: Royal Comfort
trans.desc: Private AC vehicle throughout. No sharing with strangers.

pricing.label: HERITAGE PACKAGE
pricing.headline: 8 Days Royal Rajasthan
pricing.pitch: Heritage hotels, palace dinners, and cultural experiences included.

squad.title: Family or Friends
squad.desc: Great for families, couples, and friend groups. Customizable.

footer.tagline: Every fort has a story. Come hear them.

vibe.label: THE WILD CALL
vibe.title: Into the
vibe.desc: India’s oldest national park, home to 250+ Bengal tigers. The jeep rattles through sal forests as your naturalist guides your eyes to the invisible – a pug mark, a langur’s alarm call, then suddenly – stripes.

itinerary.title: Arrive Ramnagar · Evening Safari
itinerary.desc: Check into jungle lodge. Briefing with naturalist. Evening zone safari.

itinerary.title: Full Day Safaris
itinerary.desc: Morning jeep safari (6 AM), afternoon elephant safari (2 PM). Bird watching session.

itinerary.title: Morning Safari · Departure
itinerary.desc: Final morning safari. Depart by noon.

trans.label: SAFARI RIDES
trans.title: How You Explore
trans.desc: Gypsies and Cantors for jeep safaris. Naturalist included.

pricing.label: SAFARI PACKAGE
pricing.headline: 3-Day Wildlife Package
pricing.pitch: Jungle lodge, all safaris, guide, and all meals included.

squad.title: Small Jeeps, Wild Views
squad.desc: Max 4 per jeep. Book a full jeep for your group.

cta.sub: Season: Nov – June · Park closed July–Sept

footer.tagline: Nature doesn’t rush. Neither should you.

packages.title: Andaman Beach & Honeymoon
packages.hero_meta: 5 Days · Port Blair · Havelock · Neil Island

vibe.label: ISLAND LIFE
vibe.title: Turquoise Waters &
vibe.desc: Radhanagar Beach is ranked among Asia’s best. The coral reefs at Elephant Beach are alive with colour. And the bioluminescent plankton at night – that’s something no photograph can do justice to.

itinerary.title: Port Blair Arrival
itinerary.desc: Cellular Jail, light and sound show. Ross Island evening walk.

itinerary.title: Havelock Island
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Havelock. Radhanagar Beach. Sunset and beachside dinner.

itinerary.title: Scuba & Elephant Beach
itinerary.desc: Scuba diving intro or snorkelling at Elephant Beach. Kayaking in mangroves.

itinerary.title: Neil Island
itinerary.desc: Ferry to Neil. Natural Bridge, Laxmanpur Beach. Quiet island vibes.

itinerary.title: Return to Port Blair · Depart
itinerary.desc: Ferry back. Shopping at Aberdeen Bazaar. Airport transfer.

trans.label: ISLAND HOPPING
trans.title: Sea & Air Transfers
trans.desc: Ferries between islands, flight assistance provided.

transport.name: Scooter Rental
transport.detail: On Neil Island, included in package

pricing.label: ISLAND PACKAGE
pricing.headline: 5-Day Andaman Package
pricing.pitch: Beach resort stays, all ferry tickets, and water sports included.

squad.title: Couples & Friend Groups
squad.desc: Great for couples and groups of 2–8. Private booking available.

footer.tagline: The ocean calls. Will you answer?

packages.title: Rishikesh Adventure & Yoga
packages.hero_meta: 4 Days · River Rafting · Bungee · Ganga Aarti

vibe.label: ADRENALINE + ZEN
vibe.title: Thrill by Day,
vibe.desc: Rishikesh is the only place where you can bungee jump off a 83 m cliff in the morning and meditate by the Ganges at sunset. White water rapids, ziplines, cliff jumping – and then yoga at dawn. This is balance.

itinerary.title: Arrive · Settle · Ganga Aarti
itinerary.desc: Check into camp. Evening Ganga aarti at Triveni Ghat – the real Rishikesh welcome.

itinerary.title: River Rafting
itinerary.desc: 16 km or 26 km white-water rafting on Ganga. Grade 3–4 rapids. Beach cliff jump.

itinerary.title: Bungee + Giant Swing
itinerary.desc: 83 m Mohan’s Bungee Jump. Optional: Flying Fox zipline, Giant Swing.

itinerary.title: Yoga & Departure
itinerary.desc: Dawn yoga session with certified instructor. Breakfast, checkout, depart refreshed.

trans.label: GETTING THERE
trans.title: Base Camp Access
trans.desc: Rishikesh is well-connected from Delhi by road.

pricing.label: ADVENTURE PACKAGE
pricing.headline: 4-Day Full Adventure
pricing.pitch: All adventures, camp stay, and meals by the river included.

squad.title: Adventure Squads
squad.desc: Groups of 6–20. Solo travellers welcome – join a batch!

footer.tagline: Scare yourself a little. Breathe a lot.
